productDisplayName: Mark Taylor Men Printed Red Tshirts
description: Composition Red T-shirt made of 50% polyester and 50% cotton, has a ribbed crew neckline, short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water with like colours, using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron; do not iron on print/embroidery This pop-art look graphic T-shirt from mark taylor makes for a great casual wear. The image of a singer on Youtube with the comments at the bottom gives a sneak peek into your musical bend of mind. Pair it with jeans and canvas shoes.
